emails.subject: Forestweb NDA and Linking Agreement
emails.body: Tana The below request for an NDA is from the director of Clickpaper.com. Can we process this this morning? Please disregard all of the Linking Agreement language. Thanks. Mark Senior Counsel, ENA Phone: 713-345-8897 Facsimile: 713-646-3940 E-Mail: Mark.Greenberg@enron.com Forwarded by Mark Greenberg/NA/Enron on 03/09/2001 08:52 AM John Cummings/ENRON@enronXgate 03/08/2001 06:16 PM
